Knowledge Graph Builder for Databricks

Developer overview

  • Architecture Overview
  • Getting Started

API Reference

  • OntoBricks Application Packages
  • FastAPI application (UI server)
  • api – External REST API (mounted at /api)
  • back.core – Core Domain Logic
  • back.core.databricks – Databricks Integration
  • back.core.graphdb – Pluggable Graph Database Backends
  • back.core.graphql – GraphQL Schema Generation
  • back.core.industry – Industry Standard Ontology Importers
  • back.core.reasoning – OWL 2 RL & SWRL Inference
  • back.objects – Application domain objects
  • back.core.sqlwizard – LLM-Assisted SQL Generation
  • back.core.triplestore – Pluggable RDF/Graph Backends
  • back.core.w3c – W3C Standard Parsers & Generators
  • front.routes & internal JSON API – Web UI and HTMX/API helpers
  • shared.config & front.config – Settings and constants
  • agents – LLM Agents & Tools

Additional

  • Changelog

Related Topics

  • Documentation overview
    • Module code

Source code for back.core.errors

"""Centralized error handling for OntoBricks.

Provides a custom exception hierarchy and a uniform error response model.
"""
from back.core.errors.OntoBricksError import OntoBricksError  # noqa: F401
from back.core.errors.NotFoundError import NotFoundError  # noqa: F401
from back.core.errors.ValidationError import ValidationError  # noqa: F401
from back.core.errors.AuthorizationError import AuthorizationError  # noqa: F401
from back.core.errors.InfrastructureError import InfrastructureError  # noqa: F401
from back.core.errors.ConflictError import ConflictError  # noqa: F401
from back.core.errors.ErrorResponse import ErrorResponse  # noqa: F401

_error_code_from_class = OntoBricksError.error_code_from_class




[docs]
def register_exception_handlers(app) -> None:
    """Backward-compatible wrapper — delegates to ``shared.fastapi.error_handlers``."""
    from shared.fastapi.error_handlers import register_exception_handlers as _reg
    _reg(app)




__all__ = [
    "OntoBricksError",
    "NotFoundError",
    "ValidationError",
    "AuthorizationError",
    "InfrastructureError",
    "ConflictError",
    "ErrorResponse",
    "_error_code_from_class",
    "register_exception_handlers",
]
